template.name: OCG: PASEK: SCROLL (Crawl)
template.css_template: .sub-ticker-v8 { position: relative;  width: var(--v-width, 100%); height: 50px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #dcdcdc 100%); color: #000000; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 -5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); box-sizing: border-box; white-space: nowrap; font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 49; } .active .sub-ticker-v8 { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } .ticker-wrap-v8 { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; animation: scroll-left-v8 40s linear infinite; } .news-item-v8 { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .separator-v8 { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 50px; padding: 0 25px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7F0000 0%, #7F0000 100%); color: white; font-weight: 900; font-size: 30px; font-family: ui-monospace, 'System', monospace; border-left: 2px solid white; border-right: 2px solid white; box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); letter-spacing: -1px; } @keyframes scroll-left-v8 { 0% { transform: translateX(0); } 100% { transform: translateX(-50%); } }
